creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Willem Jan Withagen from comment #4)

There's nothing special to do or that can be done, short of poking people you might already have relationships with.

One more question though (to assist the future assignee with clarity):

Is/was this port based on the existing net/ceph port with updates? Said another way, is/was the process to svn cp net/ceph net/ceph13 && make changes from there?

That is the preferable (fairly well 'enforced') method, where the origin of the port was an existing one.
